questions.question_text: CO Mapping What is data analytics? Describe the benefits of using SPSS software for Data Analysis. What type of descriptive analysis can be applied to categorical data? How cross-tabulation is used for data analysis? What is hypothesis testing? What is the Chi-Square Test? What is time series analysis? What is factor analysis? CO Mapping
Using suitable examples, describe the different measurement scales used in data collection.
What is exploratory data? What are the methods to apply exploratory data analysis? CO Mapping
Is the data for any variable in categorical form? What type of analysis could be run on that data? Illustrate with a suitable example the usage of cross-tabulation for data analysis.
Graphical analysis is a tool for presenting the data in a more understandable and easy-to-interpret form. Comment on this and explain the types of visual charts used for data analysis. CO Mapping
What is a t-test? What are the major types of t-tests that can be applied to any data? Illustrate with a suitable example.
What is ANOVA? What is the procedure of applying the ANOVA test? Illustrate with a suitable example. CO Mapping
What is regression analysis? How is the best-fit line used to predict the dependent variable?
What is the correlation analysis? How is the correlation coefficient calculated to show the relationship between two variables? Illustrate with a suitable example. 2

subparts.question_text: What are the steps in interpreting the regression model?
What is the factor analysis? What are the steps in implementing a factor analysis on any research data?
